reviews.title: Delicious breakfast
reviews.text: The hotel is a bit far from the center, but in return, it is located on a main road. There is plenty of space for car parking. The breakfast is delicious, although there aren't many dishes, but each one is well-made and suits the taste. Being far from the center allows you to feel the cool atmosphere and enjoy beautiful, open views.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Suitable for family vacations, the staff is very enthusiastic in providing support, and the breakfast buffet is quite good. However, there is no convenience store nearby the hotel, so it's best to prepare items before arriving if staying for an extended period. It's advisable to inquire about the types of rooms before booking if you want a room with a window.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: I have been here three times, and if I go to Dalat, I will stay here. The receptionist is very friendly and enthusiastic. In the morning, they serve delicious food, and the chef is very nice.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: New hotel, enthusiastic and attentive staff, clean rooms, mountain valley view is okay, I booked 2 mountain view rooms but only got 1, the other room looks out to the main street. Overall, everything is okay, it's just a bit far to get to the center, traffic jams during peak hours.

reviews.title: New hotel but very good.
reviews.text: Although it was a holiday, the hotel was fully booked and the staff were all new since it had just opened, the rooms were convenient, modern, and fresh, the staff were very enthusiastic and provided good service, the parking lot was quite good, and the breakfast was delicious. However, the wifi was unstable and the blanket was a bit thin because Da Lat is quite cold! But it was still very good compared to many other hotels with a lot of guests!

reviews.title: A peaceful place to relax.
reviews.text: This is our first time staying here, and it feels very peaceful, like returning to old Da Lat. It's recommended to book a room with a balcony because the view of the valley below and the pine hills is quite beautiful. It's close to Làng Vũ Đại coffee shop, and the music shows in the evening are also great. The only downside is that you need to open the room door to enjoy the cool air, which makes the noise of cars passing by at night a bit loud. The hotel is beautiful, clean, and luxurious. The buffet has few dishes, but they are clean, fresh, and delicious. It's 7km away from Hồ Xuân Hương, so it's more convenient for families with a car; taking a Grab taxi can be a bit expensive.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Affordable sales with breakfast included, clean rooms, fully equipped, with a view overlooking the main street and pine forest, enthusiastic staff, worth the money.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Hotel is reasonable, clean, service  good. A little problem with the noise since the noise isolation not so strong.

reviews.title: Exceptional

reviews.title: Good hotel within the price range.
reviews.text: Calyssa Hotels & Village leaves a good impression thanks to its spacious, clean facilities and well-invested infrastructure. The rooms are comfortable, with stable amenities suitable for both leisure and family stays. There is parking available for family cars. A noteworthy advantage is that the hot water system operates very quickly, almost immediately available when the tap is turned on, providing noticeable convenience, especially in the evening or early morning. Overall, this is a worthy choice if you prioritize amenities, comfort, and the quality of facilities during your trip.

reviews.title: The suburbs have the cold air of Da Lat.
reviews.text: The prices are cheap compared to the segment. Breakfast, although not varied, is very neat and classy. Honestly, I really like it and will book again if I have the chance to come to ĐL.

reviews.title: New hotel, beautiful and very comfortable.
reviews.text: The hotel is very new, clean, and conveniently located near the national highway. My family was very satisfied with our stay here. The equipment in the room is new and clean, the room is spacious and beautiful. The staff is friendly. I was upgraded to a suite room with a large balcony and a view of the pine hills. The room rate is very reasonable, even during the holiday, the breakfast was very delicious. I will come back here every time I visit Da Lat.

reviews.title: New and beautiful, spacious room with a good view.
reviews.text:
- The location is not near the center, and the area is quiet, suitable for relaxation.
- It is a newly built hotel, and the room interiors are well-equipped and complete.
- The spacious room offers a nice view of the valley; in spring, you can enjoy cherry blossoms in the nearby area.
- Fully equipped with amenities; the hot water system is very good, and it heats up quickly. The bathroom is spacious, has a window to the outside, and is fitted with a curtain system.
- New and modern equipment.
- Located on a slope, so it has a rather special design; the restaurant is in the basement but still has a view to the outside.
- There is a front and back yard for parking cars, with a guard to guide the arrangement.
- The breakfast buffet has quite delicious cooked dishes, with just enough options for breakfast.
- Friendly and attentive staff.
Needs improvement:
- The soundproofing in the hallway is not good; a lot of outside noise can be heard clearly in the room, and it can be very noisy if the room is near the elevator.
- Being right on the slope, there should be warning signs or guidance for safer movement in and out.

reviews.title: Very deserving.

reviews.title: Chất lượng không xứng đáng với giá phòng
reviews.text: Mình book 3 phòng cho gia đình ở 2 đêm, phí phòng khá cao so với mặt bằng nhưng đổi lại được ở phòng ko có ánh sáng, đồ ăn sáng thì ko đa dạng chỉ vài món, thực sự khi check in đoàn nhà mình hơi ngỡ ngàng với giá tiền và hạng phòng nơi này, 1 đi ko bao giờ trở lại. Có thể trước đó có gây hấn với nhân viên kinh doanh nên họ nhồi nhéc mình vô vị trí xấu nhất của phòng chăng? Trước khi nhận phòng mình cũng đã hình dung dc sự việc.

reviews.title: Maybe
reviews.text:
I called the hotel hotline but the call was abruptly disconnected. I arrived at the hotel at 4:30 AM, and the receptionist was sleeping on the sofa, answering guests while lying down. That day, I requested two blankets because we were two men sharing one bed. The receptionist acknowledged the request, but even after asking three times, they still didn’t provide the blankets or give a clear explanation.  

Usually, some hotels keep extra blankets ready for guests, but this one didn’t. I assume the hotel is new and needs to improve its service.  

I would still recommend this place if you’re looking for a hotel under 3 stars. My feedback is meant in good faith so the hotel can improve its service.
